subcodes.first_line: O bird of the nest of divine knowledge! In every head there is a mystery, and in every heart a thought and yearning. If thou seekest a mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیر آشیان عرفان در هر سری سریست و در هر دلی فکری و سودائی اگر سری جوای
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @transcending the material condition, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
